name: anywidget-experiments
description: Composable anywidget-based widgets for geospatial visualization

scripts.build-widgets: find widgets -mindepth 2 -maxdepth 2 -name package.json -execdir npm run build \;
scripts.clean-widgets: find widgets -name node_modules -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true && find widgets -name dist -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.prebuild: npm run build-widgets && jupyter nbconvert --to notebook --execute --inplace notebooks/03_lonboard_static.ipynb notebooks/04_lonboard_interop.ipynb notebooks/07_terra_ui.ipynb notebooks/08_chart_widget_demo.ipynb notebooks/09_chartgpu_performance.ipynb notebooks/10_nyc_buildings.ipynb notebooks/11_jslink_demo.ipynb notebooks/12_typescript_widget.ipynb
